ValidationRule.description: Tier-2 enforcement (F7). Rejects malformed email addresses on upsert so the SOURCE malformed-email defects must be cleansed before load. Seed-safe: seed Contacts carry well-formed emails and pass. Fires only on values that fail a basic email pattern.
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Email address is not in a valid format. Cleanse the source email before migrating (check for missing @, spaces, double dots, or trailing characters).
